title: Second US aircraft shot down by Iran
description: Two American aircraft have been shot down in the Middle East this morning by Iranian forces. The US Air Force and Iranian forces began desperately searching for the crew. One pilot has been rescued and is being treated; the other remains missing. #us #iran

title: Suppliers want Coles and Woolies to raise prices amid fuel crisis
description: Pressure on Australia's food and grocery suppliers could mean higher prices on supermarket shelves in the next fortnight, as the war with Iran continues. #iran #supermarket #woolies #coles
